database_findings.binary_pgo: /usr/local/mysql-opt/bin/mysqld (67987744 bytes, was deleted after exec, re-copied from host)

applied_changes.rationale: Benchmark prerequisite - 64 sysbench threads × ~256 prepared statements each exceeded the default limit of 16382, causing FATAL errors on benchmark start
applied_changes.validation: SET GLOBAL succeeded, benchmark ran without prepared statement errors

applied_changes.rationale: Read-only workload (oltp_read_only) performs zero DML operations (inserts/updates/deletes). Change buffering is CPU overhead for maintaining buffer for operations that never happen. Setting to NONE eliminates this overhead without any functional impact.
applied_changes.validation: SET GLOBAL succeeded, benchmark verified (no regression)

applied_changes.rationale: Match the 64 concurrent benchmark threads. Reduces thread creation/teardown overhead between benchmark runs (63 threads cached after run completed).
applied_changes.validation: SET GLOBAL succeeded, Threads_cached=63 confirmed after benchmark

applied_changes.rationale: Double the table cache to reduce any potential table open overhead. With 64 tables and high concurrency (64 threads), double the cache provides headroom.
applied_changes.validation: SET GLOBAL succeeded, table cache hit rate remains >99.99%

applied_changes.rationale: Tested AHI=OFF vs AHI=ON. Benchmark results: AHI=OFF → 10,453 TPS avg, AHI=ON → 10,779 TPS avg (3.1% better). AHI helps point lookups in oltp_read_only workload. Keeping AHI=ON.
applied_changes.validation: Two benchmarks confirmed AHI=ON is superior for this workload

applied_changes.rationale: Free pages dropped to 0 after warmup, indicating the working set now fully utilizes buffer pool. Increasing to 28GB leaves 4GB headroom and improves cache hit ratio. Container limit is 32GB.
applied_changes.validation: Online resize completed. 277089 new free pages (4.2GB). Benchmark: 10,967 TPS avg (1.7% improvement over 24GB).

rejected_optimization_actions.reason: Requires restart. Binary was deleted from container filesystem after exec (re-copied from host). Restart risk outweighs benefit for read-only workload with 97% buffer pool hit rate.
Requires restart. Changing from ON to OFF requires --no-defaults startup modification. Would need to modify container's MySQL startup command.

Increase from 256KB to 4MB. All sorts are in-memory (Sort_merge_passes=0), so larger sort buffer does not reduce I/O. CPU hotspot is in my_strnxfrm_any_uca (string comparison), not sort buffer management.
Increase from 256KB. With 97% buffer pool hit rate, no disk-based row reads happening after sort.
Read-only workload produces negligible redo log traffic (Innodb_log_writes=12, Innodb_os_log_written=31KB over 270s). Current 2GB log files are already oversized for this workload.

benchmark_results.baseline_stated_condition: cpu-affinity + PGO optimized (user stated, different run conditions)

bottleneck_hotspot_analysis.description: UTF-8 string comparison in filesort/ORDER BY
bottleneck_hotspot_analysis.impact: High - 14% CPU from string comparison during ORDER BY on VARCHAR columns with utf8mb4_unicode_ci collation
bottleneck_hotspot_analysis.root_cause: oltp_read_only workload uses ORDER BY on VARCHAR columns. MySQL's utf8mb4_unicode_ci collation requires expensive multi-byte string comparison (my_strnxfrm_any_uca).

mitigation_suggestions.suggestion: Change ORDER BY columns to use utf8mb4_bin collation if binary ordering is acceptable
Add covering indexes on ORDER BY columns to avoid filesort
Change default collation to utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci (faster than utf8mb4_unicode_ci) - requires table rebuild
mitigation_suggestions.impact: medium - would reduce but not eliminate my_strnxfrm_any_uca

iteration_decision_reason: All config-level optimizations for oltp_read_only workload have been exhausted. The remaining hotspot (my_strnxfrm_any_uca at 14.01%) requires application-level changes (collation, indexes) or a different MySQL build with faster UTF-8 comparison. Recommended next round: verify with profile to confirm hotspot remains, then consider application-level ORDER BY optimization or collation change.

next_round_candidate_configs.note: Restart required. After PGO binary is confirmed stable in container, increase read IO threads for 192-CPU client.
Restart required. Can save 5-10% CPU for OLTP workloads. Requires modifying container's MySQL startup command.
